name: Glofox Gym & Studio Management API
what_it_does: Glofox REST API for boutique gym and fitness studio management platform. Enables AI agents to manage member profiles and memberships, schedule and manage fitness classes and appointments, process payments and plan renewals, track attendance and check-ins, manage instructor and staff scheduling, handle lead and prospect workflows, and integrate member data with marketing and communication systems.
use_cases: Managing member enrollment and membership status from fitness operations agents
Scheduling classes and appointments from member experience agents
Tracking attendance and engagement from member retention agents
Processing membership renewals and payment processing from billing automation agents
not_for: Large commercial gyms without boutique studio focus
Corporate wellness programs without consumer fitness studio workflows
Healthcare fitness without clinical wellness management requirements
best_when: A boutique gym, yoga studio, or fitness franchise wants AI agents to automate member onboarding, class scheduling, attendance tracking, and membership renewal communications.
avoid_when: PRIVACY: Member health and fitness data, along with payment information, requires careful handling. Automated member communications must comply with applicable marketing regulations.

auth.notes: Glofox uses OAuth 2.0 for API access. Branch-level credentials (each gym location is a 'branch'). Partner program for third-party integrations. Developer portal with sandbox environment.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — boutique fitness SaaS pricing
pricing.paid_tiers: Monthly per-location pricing; API access available for integrations
pricing.notes: Irish company (Dublin), founded 2014. Boutique fitness studio focus. Acquired by ABC Fitness Solutions in 2022. Strong in yoga, CrossFit, Pilates, and martial arts studios.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; documented in developer portal

known_agent_gotchas: PRIVACY: Member health and fitness data along with payment info requires careful handling
No public MCP server — REST API with OAuth2 partner program
Branch-level credential model — each gym location has separate credentials
Irish company — GDPR compliance; EU data residency default
Acquired by ABC Fitness 2022 — API roadmap may shift with parent company priorities
Boutique fitness focus — limited features for large commercial gym operations
agent_readiness.security_notes: Member health/fitness and payment data. GDPR, PCI-DSS. OAuth2 with branch-level scoping. EU/US data residency. Irish company.

security_score_components.security_notes: Member health and payment data. GDPR, PCI-DSS. OAuth2. EU/US data residency. Irish company.
